parameters.query: SELECT slug, name, description, icon, category, tags, view_count FROM sn_spokes WHERE is_active=true AND (LOWER(name) LIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $json.query }}') || '%' OR LOWER(description) LIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $json.query }}') || '%' OR LOWER(category) LIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $json.query }}') || '%' OR '{{ $json.query }}' = ANY(tags)) ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT 20

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, results: $input.all().map(i => i.json), total: $input.all().length }) }}
